title: Test management in Bitbucket Pipelines
description: Bitbucket Cloud now offers test management features in Bitbucket Pipelines (Standard, Premium, and Enterprise only). You can organize, track, and analyze your test cases with execution summaries, metrics, and tools to manage flaky or quarantined tests. This helps teams improve build reliability by identifying and tackling the flaky tests. To get started with this change (Standard, Premium, and Enterprise only):
